body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule R 2025 Quebec parental insurance plan premium.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.R-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule R numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 2000
Value: 98000
Value: 0.878
Value: 0.00878
Value: 860.44
Value: 43.736
Value: 0.43736
Value: 0.494
Value: 0.00494

Schedule R says that if the total of net business income, employment income subject to QPIP, and insurable earnings as a person responsible for a family-type resource or intermediate resource is less than $2,000, the taxpayer does not have to pay a premium.

Part A calculates the premium on income from self-employment. Line 10 is net business income from line 27 of Schedule L, with negative amounts entered as zero. Line 11 is insurable earnings of a person responsible for a family-type resource or intermediate resource from line 40 of Schedule L. Line 12 adds lines 10 and 11. Line 13 gives maximum insurable earnings of $98,000. Line 14 is the total of RL-1 box I amounts, or box A if box I is blank. Line 16 is employment income earned outside Quebec from line 32. Line 18 adds lines 14 and 16. Line 20 subtracts line 18 from line 13 and floors the result at zero. Line 22 is the lesser of line 12 and line 20. Line 24 multiplies line 22 by 0.878%, subject to a maximum of $860.44, and carries the QPIP premium to TP-1 line 439. Line 26 multiplies line 24 by 43.736% and carries the deduction for the QPIP premium to TP-1 line 248.

Part B calculates the premium for Quebec residents who worked outside Quebec. Line 30 is income from employment in Canada outside Quebec from T4 box 14. Line 31 is income from employment outside Canada for which the taxpayer did not receive an RL-1 slip. Line 32 adds lines 30 and 31. Line 33 gives maximum insurable earnings of $98,000. Line 34 is total RL-1 box I amounts, or box A if box I is blank. Line 35 subtracts line 34 from line 33 and floors the result at zero. Line 36 is the lesser of line 32 and line 35. Line 37 multiplies line 36 by 0.494%. Line 42 subtracts federal income tax return line 45100 from line 45000. Line 44 subtracts line 42 from line 37 and carries the QPIP premium to TP-1 line 439.
